positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a crescent moon and constellations, forming a stylized Zodiac tapestry pattern. Central composition, featuring bold, clean silhouettes of celestial objects (like a lion, scales, and arrow) framed by elegant, single-weight line art. The color palette should be deep navy blue, muted gold, and creamy off-white. High contrast, symmetrical balance, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Seamless repeating pattern elements should be suggested within the composition.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, low resolution, artifact, grain, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame
